name: aa-node-framework-smoke-zod3
description: Real-agent smoke drivers for the zod-3 Node frameworks (LangChain.js, LangGraph.js, Vercel AI SDK, Mastra) — AAASM-3525. Split from @openai/agents (which pins zod 4) so a single node_modules has no zod major conflict. Installed + driven by tests/live/node_frameworks.py; never published.
